title: Google DeepMind and Korea Partner to Accelerate Scientific Discovery — Google DeepMind
description: Google DeepMind partners with Korea's MSIT to establish an AI Campus to help accelerate scientific breakthroughs, support local talent, and advance AI safety research

title: Decoupled DiLoCo: Resilient, Distributed AI Training at Scale — Google DeepMind
description: Google’s new distributed architecture keeps AI training runs on track across distant data centers, with exceptional efficiency – even when hardware fails.

title: Google DeepMind partners with global consultancies to accelerate enterprise AI adoption. — Google DeepMind
description: Google DeepMind is partnering with leading consultancies to bridge the AI adoption gap and drive agentic transformation with frontier models and expert research.

title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: New text-to-speech AI model
description: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS is now available across Google products.

title: Gemini Robotics ER 1.6: Enhanced Embodied Reasoning — Google DeepMind
description: Gemini Robotics ER 1.6 upgrades spatial reasoning and multi-view understanding, unlocking new capabilities like instrument reading for autonomous robots.

title: Gemma 4: Our most capable open models to date
description: Gemma 4: our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.

title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Google’s latest AI audio model
description: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.

description: Google DeepMind releases new findings and an evaluation framework to measure AI's potential for harmful manipulation in areas like finance and health, with the goal of enhancing AI safety.

title: Lyria 3 expands to more Google products, adds more features
description: We are bringing Lyria 3 to the tools where professionals work and create every day.

title: Measuring Progress Towards AGI: A Cognitive Framework
description: Google DeepMind proposes a cognitive framework to evaluate AGI and launches a Kaggle hackathon to build capability benchmarks

title: AlphaGo at 10: How AI Innovation Is Paving the Path to AGI — Google DeepMind
description: Ten years since AlphaGo, we explore how its search and learning methods are catalyzing scientific discovery and paving a path to AGI.

description: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.

description: Our latest image generation model offers advanced world knowledge, production-ready specs, subject consistency and more, all at Flash speed.

title: Gemini 3.1 Pro: Announcing our latest Gemini AI model
description: 3.1 Pro is designed for tasks where a simple answer isn’t enough.

title: Use Lyria 3 to create music tracks in the Gemini app
description: Lyria 3 is now available in the Gemini app. Create custom, high-quality 30-second tracks from text and images.

title: Google DeepMind Partnerships in India: scaling AI in science and education — Google DeepMind
description: Google DeepMind announces new AI partnerships in India to advance scientific research, empower students with interactive Gemini-powered learning, and support national goals in agriculture and renewable energy.

title: Gemini 3 Deep Think: AI model update designed for science
description: We’re releasing a major upgrade to Gemini 3 Deep Think, our specialized reasoning mode.

description: Gemini Deep Think is accelerating discovery in maths, physics, and computer science by acting as a powerful scientific companion for researchers.

description: Meet D4RT, a unified AI model for 4D scene reconstruction and tracking.

title: Introducing Gemini 3 Flash: Benchmarks, global availability

title: Gemma Scope 2: Helping the AI Safety Community Deepen Understanding of Complex Language Model Behavior — Google DeepMind

description: An upgraded Gemini 2.5 Native Audio model across Google products and live speech translation in the Google Translate app.

title: Deepening AI Safety Research with UK AI Security Institute (AISI) — Google DeepMind
description: Google DeepMind and the UK AI Security Institute (AISI) strengthen collaboration through a new research partnership, focusing on critical safety research areas like monitoring AI reasoning and evaluating social and economic impacts.

title: Our partnership with the UK government — Google DeepMind
description: We're collaborating with the UK government to accelerate progress in science, education, national security and more.

title: FACTS Benchmark Suite: a new way to systematically evaluate LLMs factuality — Google DeepMind
description: The FACTS Benchmark Suite provides a systematic evaluation of Large Language Models (LLMs) factuality across three areas: Parametric, Search, and Multimodal reasoning.

title: How AlphaFold is helping scientists engineer more heat-tolerant crops — Google DeepMind
description: Scientists are using AlphaFold to strengthen a vital photosynthesis enzyme (GLYK), paving the way for more resilient, heat-tolerant crops that can adapt to a warming climate and help secure food production for future generations.

title: AlphaFold: Five Years of Impact — Google DeepMind
description: Explore five years of AlphaFold’s impact on biology. Learn how this Nobel Prize-winning AI is accelerating scientific discovery globally

title: AlphaFold Reveals a Key Protein Behind Heart Disease — Google DeepMind
description: Discover how scientists used AlphaFold to map the protein behind heart disease and how this breakthrough could transform treatment.

title: Google DeepMind & DOE Partner on Genesis: AI for Science — Google DeepMind
description: Google DeepMind supports U.S. Department of Energy on Genesis: a national mission to accelerate innovation and scientific discovery.

description: Introducing SIMA 2, the next milestone in our research creating general and helpful AI agents. By integrating the advanced capabilities of our Gemini models, SIMA is evolving from an instruction-follower into an interactive gaming companion.

description: Aligning AI vision models with human knowledge, improves their robustness and ability to generalize.

description: Discover how AI models are helping scientists better understand our biosphere, from predicting deforestation to mapping species and listening to wildlife.

description: New AI model integrates petabytes of Earth observation data to generate a unified data representation that revolutionizes global mapping and monitoring

description: New experimental AI tool helps people explore the context and origin of images seen online.

title: Advanced version of Gemini with Deep Think officially achieves gold-medal standard at the International Mathematical Olympiad — Google DeepMind
description: The International Mathematical Olympiad (“IMO”) is the world’s most prestigious competition for young mathematicians, and has been held annually since 1959. Each country taking part is represented by six elite, pre-university mathematicians who compete to solve six exceptionally difficult problems in algebra, combinatorics, geometry, and number theory.

title: Aeneas transforms how historians connect the past — Google DeepMind
description: Introducing the first model for contextualizing ancient inscriptions, designed to help historians better interpret, attribute and restore fragmentary texts.

title: Genie 3: A new frontier for world models — Google DeepMind
description: Today we are announcing Genie 3, a general purpose world model that can generate an unprecedented diversity of interactive environments. Given a text prompt, Genie 3 can generate dynamic worlds that you can navigate in real time at 24 frames per second, retaining consistency for a few minutes at a resolution of 720p.

title: How AI is helping advance the science of bioacoustics to save endangered species — Google DeepMind
description: Our new Perch model helps conservationists analyze audio faster to protect endangered species, from Hawaiian honeycreepers to coral reefs.

title: Using AI to perceive the universe in greater depth — Google DeepMind
description: Using AI to perceive the universe in greater depth

title: Gemini achieves gold-medal level at the International Collegiate Programming Contest World Finals — Google DeepMind
description: Gemini 2.5 Deep Think achieves breakthrough performance at the world’s most prestigious computer programming competition, demonstrating a profound leap in abstract problem solving.

title: Discovering new solutions to century-old problems in fluid dynamics — Google DeepMind
description: Our new method could help mathematicians leverage AI techniques to tackle long-standing challenges in mathematics, physics and engineering.

title: Google DeepMind strengthens the Frontier Safety Framework — Google DeepMind
description: Today, we’re publishing the third iteration of our Frontier Safety Framework (FSF) — our most comprehensive approach yet to identifying and mitigating severe risks from advanced AI models. This update builds on ongoing collaboration with experts across industry, academia and government. We’ve also incorporated lessons learned from implementing previous versions and evolving best practices in frontier AI safety.

title: Gemini Robotics 1.5 brings AI agents into the physical world — Google DeepMind
description: We’re powering an era of physical agents — enabling robots to perceive, plan, think, use tools and act to better solve complex, multi-step tasks.

title: Introducing CodeMender: an AI agent for code security — Google DeepMind
description: Using advanced AI to fix critical software vulnerabilities

title: Google DeepMind is bringing AI to the next generation of fusion energy — Google DeepMind
description: We’re announcing our research partnership with Commonwealth Fusion Systems (CFS) to bring clean, safe, limitless fusion energy closer to reality with our advanced AI systems. This partnership builds on our groundbreaking work using AI to successfully control a plasma.

title: Gemini 2.5: Deep Think is now rolling out
description: Deep Think utilizes extended, parallel thinking and novel reinforcement learning techniques for significantly improved problem-solving.

description: Kaggle Game Arena is a new platform where AI models compete head-to-head in complex strategic games.
